SpigotPasteOperation
SpigotPasteOperation is responsible for pasting schematic blocks into a Spigot world.
SpigotPropHandler
Handler interface for updating properties of BlockData instances in Spigot.
SpigotSchematic
Represents a schematic implementation for the Spigot platform.
SpigotSchematicBuilder
Builder for SpigotSchematic instances.
SpigotSchematicFactory
Factory for creating SpigotSchematic instances and related metadata.
SpigotSchematicHelper
Utility class for creating and loading SpigotSchematic instances from a region in a Bukkit World.
SpigotSchematicPlacer
Interface for placing schematic blocks in Spigot.
